diagrams.title: C++ Program Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the basic structure of a C++ program with main function and header inclusion
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the skeleton of every C++ program

diagrams.title: Data Flow in I/O Streams
diagrams.description: Visualizes how data flows between input/output devices and program variables using streams
diagrams.purpose: Understanding stream direction and operators (<< and >>)

diagrams.title: Command-line Arguments Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how argc and argv capture command-line input
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how programs receive external input at startup
